name: Playstation
philosophy: | A three-surface marketing system organized around alternating black, white, and PlayStation Blue chapters that scroll past the viewer like a console launch trailer.
trademark_signals: Three-canvas chapter system: (black), (white), (PlayStation Blue) alternating down the page
PlayStation Blue (#0070d1) is the universal primary CTA — fully-rounded pill at (9999px)
Commerce orange (#d53b00) is the secondary CTA reserved for "Buy now" / "Pre-order" / store actions
PlayStation SST display tier renders at weight 300 with -0.1px to +0.4px tracking — the brand's signature airy editorial voice
8px-radius  for product cards and feature panels; 4px-radius  for inputs; pills  for every CTA
ai_slop_avoided: introduce drop shadows on resting cards. The system is flat-on-canvas; cards lift only on press
replace with another shade of blue. The brand blue is precise — #0070d1 for default and #0064b7 for pressed
use (orange) on marketing/hero CTAs. It's reserved exclusively for store actions
